---
title: "Analysis"
author: "Jonathan Kellogg"
date: "2026-03-23"
output: html_document
---

```{r setup, include=FALSE}
knitr::opts_chunk$set(echo = TRUE)
```

```{r}
suppressPackageStartupMessages({
  library(dplyr)
  library(tidyr)
  library(stringr)
  library(lubridate)
  library(data.table)
  library(readr)
  library(readODS)
  library(stargazer)
  library(sandwich)
  library(lmtest)
  library(manifestoR)
  library(fixest)
  library(marginaleffects)
  library(knitr)
  library(kableExtra)
  library(janitor)
  library(modelsummary)
})
```

## Load data

Load the final merged dataset produced by 03_structural_descriptive_analysis.Rmd.
Place the file in data/ (available on Google Drive):
https://drive.google.com/drive/folders/1qhlCgEDZf6_V5UZm3bGnyvRdhsjHgEl5

```{r}
df <- read.csv("data/df_final_merged.csv", stringsAsFactors = FALSE)
```

## Baseline model
## Standardize
```{r}
df <- df %>%
  mutate(across(where(is.numeric), scale))
```

```{r}
model_baseline <- lm(divergence_vs_title ~ section_salience + Amount, data = df)

summary(model_baseline)
```


```{r}
# Subset the two variables
vars <- df[, c("divergence_vs_title", "hiddenness_textual")]

# Keep only rows with finite values
good_rows <- complete.cases(vars) & apply(vars, 1, function(x) all(is.finite(x)))
vars_clean <- vars[good_rows, ]

# Run PCA
pca <- prcomp(vars_clean, center = TRUE, scale. = TRUE)

# Add results back to df
df$PC1 <- NA
df$PC2 <- NA

df$PC1[good_rows] <- pca$x[, 1]
df$PC2[good_rows] <- pca$x[, 2]

model <- lm(PC1 ~ lobby_z, data = df)

summary(model)

```

```{r}
df <- df %>%
  mutate(
    Amount = as.numeric(gsub("[\\$,]", "", Amount)),
    lobby = case_when(
      country == "EU"  ~ lobby_avg,
      country == "USA" ~ Amount,
      TRUE             ~ NA_real_
    ),
    salience_z = as.numeric(scale(section_salience)),
    salience_broad_z = as.numeric(scale(section_salience_broad)),
    lobby_z = as.numeric(scale(lobby)),
    salience_z_sq = salience_z^2
  )

df_no_eu <- df %>% filter(country != "EU")

model1 <- feols(
  divergence_vs_title ~ salience_z + lobby_z | country,
  data = df,
  cluster = ~section_topic
)

model2 <- feols(
  divergence_vs_title ~ salience_broad_z + lobby_z | country,
  data = df,
  cluster = ~section_topic
)

model3 <- feols(
  divergence_vs_title ~ salience_z | country,
  data = df,
  cluster = ~section_topic
)

model4 <- feols(
  divergence_vs_title ~ salience_z + split_government | country,
  data = df,
  cluster = ~section_topic
)

model5 <- feols(
  divergence_vs_title ~ salience_z + salience_z_sq + lobby_z | country,
  data = df,
  cluster = ~section_topic
)

model6 <- feols(
  divergence_vs_title ~ salience_z + salience_z_sq + split_government | country,
  data = df_no_eu,
  cluster = ~section_topic
)

model7 <- feols(
  divergence_vs_title ~ salience_z * lobby_z | country,
  data = df,
  cluster = ~section_topic
)

model8 <- feols(
  divergence_vs_title ~ salience_z * lobby_z + salience_z_sq | country,
  data = df,
  cluster = ~section_topic
)

etable(
  model1, model2, model3, model4, model5, model6, model7, model8,
  tex = TRUE,
  file = "output/regression_table.tex",
  dict = c(
    salience_z = "Section salience",
    salience_z_sq = "Section salience$^2$",
    salience_broad_z = "Broad salience",
    lobby_z = "Lobbying",
    `salience_z:lobby_z` = "Salience $\\times$ Lobbying",
    split_government = "Split government"
  )
)

```

```{r}
ecm_df <- df %>%
  mutate(
    Amount = as.numeric(gsub("[\\$,]", "", Amount)),
    lobby = case_when(
      country == "EU"  ~ lobby_avg,
      country == "USA" ~ Amount,
      TRUE             ~ NA_real_
    )
  ) %>%
  arrange(country, year) %>%
  group_by(country) %>%
  mutate(
    divergence_vs_title_z = as.numeric(scale(divergence_vs_title)),
    salience_z = as.numeric(scale(section_salience)),
    salience_broad_z = as.numeric(scale(section_salience_broad)),
    lobby_z = as.numeric(scale(lobby)),
    salience_z_sq = salience_z^2,

    d_divergence_vs_title = divergence_vs_title_z - lag(divergence_vs_title_z),
    d_salience = salience_z - lag(salience_z),
    d_salience_broad = salience_broad_z - lag(salience_broad_z),
    d_lobby = lobby_z - lag(lobby_z),

    l_divergence_vs_title = lag(divergence_vs_title_z),
    l_salience = lag(salience_z),
    l_salience_broad = lag(salience_broad_z),
    l_lobby = lag(lobby_z)
  ) %>%
  ungroup() %>%
  filter(
    !is.na(d_divergence_vs_title),
    !is.na(l_divergence_vs_title)
  )

ecm1 <- feols(
  d_divergence_vs_title ~ d_salience + d_lobby + l_divergence_vs_title + l_salience + l_lobby | country,
  data = ecm_df,
  cluster = ~section_topic
)

ecm2 <- feols(
  d_divergence_vs_title ~ d_salience_broad + d_lobby + l_divergence_vs_title + l_salience_broad + l_lobby | country,
  data = ecm_df,
  cluster = ~section_topic
)

ecm3 <- feols(
  d_divergence_vs_title ~ d_salience + l_divergence_vs_title + l_salience + l_lobby | country,
  data = ecm_df,
  cluster = ~section_topic
)

ecm4 <- feols(
  d_divergence_vs_title ~ d_salience + split_government + l_divergence_vs_title + l_salience | country,
  data = ecm_df,
  cluster = ~section_topic
)

ecm5 <- feols(
  d_divergence_vs_title ~ d_salience + l_divergence_vs_title + l_salience + l_lobby + d_salience*d_lobby + l_salience*l_lobby | country,
  data = ecm_df,
  cluster = ~section_topic
)



etable(
  ecm1, ecm2, ecm3, ecm4, ecm5,
  tex = TRUE,
  file = "output/ecm_regression_table.tex",
  dict = c(
    d_salience = "Change in section salience",
    d_salience_broad = "Change in broad salience",
    d_lobby = "Change in lobbying",
    l_divergence_vs_title = "Lagged divergence_vs_title",
    l_salience = "Lagged section salience",
    l_salience_broad = "Lagged broad salience",
    l_lobby = "Lagged lobbying",
    salience_z_sq = "Section salience$^2$",
    split_government = "Split government"
  )
)

```


```{r}
df <- df %>%
  mutate(
    Amount = as.numeric(gsub("[\\$,]", "", Amount)),
    lobby = case_when(
      country == "EU"  ~ lobby_avg,
      country == "USA" ~ Amount,
      TRUE             ~ NA_real_
    ),
    salience_z = as.numeric(scale(section_salience)),
    salience_broad_z = as.numeric(scale(section_salience_broad)),
    lobby_z = as.numeric(scale(lobby)),
    salience_z_sq = salience_z^2
  )

model1 <- feols(
  hiddenness_textual ~ salience_z + lobby_z | country,
  data = df,
  cluster = ~section_topic
)

model2 <- feols(
  hiddenness_textual ~ salience_broad_z + lobby_z | country,
  data = df,
  cluster = ~section_topic
)

model3 <- feols(
  hiddenness_textual ~ salience_z | country,
  data = df,
  cluster = ~section_topic
)

model4 <- feols(
  hiddenness_textual ~ salience_z + split_government | country,
  data = df,
  cluster = ~section_topic
)

model5 <- feols(
  hiddenness_textual ~ salience_z + salience_z_sq + lobby_z | country,
  data = df,
  cluster = ~section_topic
)

model6 <- feols(
  hiddenness_textual ~ salience_z + salience_z_sq + split_government | country,
  data = df_no_eu,
  cluster = ~section_topic
)

model7 <- feols(
  hiddenness_textual ~ salience_z * lobby_z | country,
  data = df,
  cluster = ~section_topic
)

model8 <- feols(
  hiddenness_textual ~ salience_z * lobby_z + salience_z_sq | country,
  data = df,
  cluster = ~section_topic
)

etable(
  model1, model2, model3, model4, model5, model6, model7, model8,
  tex = TRUE,
  file = "output/regression_table_textual.tex",
  dict = c(
    salience_z = "Section salience",
    salience_z_sq = "Section salience$^2$",
    salience_broad_z = "Broad salience",
    lobby_z = "Lobbying",
    `salience_z:lobby_z` = "Salience $\\times$ Lobbying",
    split_government = "Split government"
  )
)
```


```{r}
ecm_df <- df %>%
  mutate(
    Amount = as.numeric(gsub("[\\$,]", "", Amount)),
    lobby = case_when(
      country == "EU"  ~ lobby_avg,
      country == "USA" ~ Amount,
      TRUE             ~ NA_real_
    )
  ) %>%
  arrange(country, year) %>%
  group_by(country) %>%
  mutate(
    hiddenness_textual_z = as.numeric(scale(hiddenness_textual)),
    salience_z = as.numeric(scale(section_salience)),
    salience_broad_z = as.numeric(scale(section_salience_broad)),
    lobby_z = as.numeric(scale(lobby)),
    salience_z_sq = salience_z^2,

    d_hiddenness_textual = hiddenness_textual_z - lag(hiddenness_textual_z),
    d_salience = salience_z - lag(salience_z),
    d_salience_broad = salience_broad_z - lag(salience_broad_z),
    d_lobby = lobby_z - lag(lobby_z),

    l_hiddenness_textual = lag(hiddenness_textual_z),
    l_salience = lag(salience_z),
    l_salience_broad = lag(salience_broad_z),
    l_lobby = lag(lobby_z)
  ) %>%
  ungroup() %>%
  filter(
    !is.na(d_hiddenness_textual),
    !is.na(l_hiddenness_textual)
  )

ecm1 <- feols(
  d_hiddenness_textual ~ d_salience + d_lobby + l_hiddenness_textual + l_salience + l_lobby | country,
  data = ecm_df,
  cluster = ~section_topic
)

ecm2 <- feols(
  d_hiddenness_textual ~ d_salience_broad + d_lobby + l_hiddenness_textual + l_salience_broad + l_lobby | country,
  data = ecm_df,
  cluster = ~section_topic
)

ecm3 <- feols(
  d_hiddenness_textual ~ d_salience + l_hiddenness_textual + l_salience + l_lobby | country,
  data = ecm_df,
  cluster = ~section_topic
)

ecm4 <- feols(
  d_hiddenness_textual ~ d_salience + split_government + l_hiddenness_textual + l_salience | country,
  data = ecm_df,
  cluster = ~section_topic
)


ecm5 <- feols(
  d_hiddenness_textual ~ d_salience + l_hiddenness_textual + l_salience + l_lobby + d_salience*d_lobby + l_salience*l_lobby | country,
  data = ecm_df,
  cluster = ~section_topic
)

etable(
  ecm1, ecm2, ecm3, ecm4, ecm5,
  tex = TRUE,
  file = "output/ecm_regression_table_textual.tex",
  dict = c(
    d_salience = "Change in section salience",
    d_salience_broad = "Change in broad salience",
    d_lobby = "Change in lobbying",
    l_hiddenness_textual = "Lagged hiddenness_textual",
    l_salience = "Lagged section salience",
    l_salience_broad = "Lagged broad salience",
    l_lobby = "Lagged lobbying",
    salience_z_sq = "Section salience$^2$",
    split_government = "Split government"
  )
)
```

## By legislation
```{r}
map_lobby_topic <- function(x, broad = FALSE) {
  x <- str_to_lower(trimws(coalesce(as.character(x), "")))
  default_value <- if (broad) "none" else NA_character_

  case_when(
    str_detect(x, "finance|insur|realest") ~ "finance",
    str_detect(x, "health") ~ "healthcare",
    str_detect(x, "communic|electronic|tech") ~ "technology",
    str_detect(x, "labor") ~ "labor",
    str_detect(x, "agribusiness|agricultur") ~ "agriculture",
    str_detect(x, "energy|nat resource") ~ "energy",
    str_detect(x, "transport") ~ "transportation",
    str_detect(x, "defense") ~ "defense",

    broad & str_detect(x, "lawyer|lobby") ~ "justice",
    broad & str_detect(x, "construction") ~ "housing",
    broad & str_detect(x, "misc business") ~ "trade",
    broad & str_detect(x, "ideology|single-issue") ~ "social",
    broad & str_detect(x, "other") ~ "none",

    TRUE ~ default_value
  )
}

df <- df %>% clean_names() %>%
  mutate(
    year = as.integer(year),
    year_lag = year - 1,
    title_label = str_to_lower(trimws(as.character(title_label))),
    country = as.character(country),
    title_topic = map_lobby_topic(title_label, broad = TRUE)
  )

us_lobby_combined <- read.csv("data/US_Lobby_Sector_Totals_Combined.csv",
                               stringsAsFactors = FALSE)
us_lobby_combined <- us_lobby_combined %>%
  clean_names() %>%
  mutate(
    year = as.integer(year),
    sector = str_to_lower(trimws(as.character(sector))),
    lobby_topic = map_lobby_topic(sector, broad = TRUE)
  )

df_usa <- df %>% filter(country == "USA")
df_other <- df %>% filter(country != "USA")

df_usa_joined <- df_usa %>%
  left_join(
    us_lobby_combined,
    by = c("title_topic" = "lobby_topic", "year_lag" = "year")
  )


EU_lobby <- read_ods("data/EU_lobby.ods") %>%
  clean_names()

EU_lobby_avg <- EU_lobby %>%
  mutate(
    sector_raw = str_to_lower(trimws(as.character(sector))),
    lobby_topic = case_when(
      sector_raw == "big tech" ~ "technology",
      sector_raw %in% c("banking & finance", "insurance") ~ "finance",
      sector_raw == "energy" ~ "energy",
      sector_raw == "chemicals & agribusiness" ~ "agriculture",
      sector_raw == "pharma" ~ "healthcare",
      sector_raw == "manufacturing" ~ "trade",
      sector_raw %in% c("automobiles", "transport & logistics") ~ "transportation",
      sector_raw == "defence & security" ~ "defense",
      sector_raw == "food" ~ "agriculture",
      sector_raw == "metals and mining" ~ "energy",
      sector_raw == "services" ~ "trade",
      sector_raw %in% c("cross-sector", "tobacco") ~ "none",
      TRUE ~ NA_character_
    ),
    lobby_avg = rowMeans(
      select(., lobby_budget_08_02_2025, lobby_budget_08_02_2024, lobby_budget_08_02_2020),
      na.rm = TRUE
    )
  ) %>%
  filter(!is.na(lobby_topic), sector_raw != "sum") %>%
  select(lobby_topic, lobby_avg)

df_eu <- bind_rows(df_usa_joined, df_other) %>%
  filter(country == "EU")

df_other2 <- bind_rows(df_usa_joined, df_other) %>%
  filter(country != "EU")

df_eu_joined <- df_eu %>%
  left_join(EU_lobby_avg, by = c("title_topic" = "lobby_topic"))

df_final_merged <- bind_rows(df_eu_joined, df_other2)


```


```{r}
# Start from the merged data, build lobby, then keep the same numeric standardization
df <- df_final_merged %>%
  mutate(
    Amount = as.numeric(gsub("[\\$,]", "", amount_x)),
    lobby = case_when(
      country == "EU"  ~ lobby_avg,
      country == "USA" ~ Amount,
      TRUE             ~ NA_real_
    )
  ) %>%
  mutate(across(where(is.numeric), scale)) %>%
  mutate(
    lobby_z = as.numeric(lobby),
    salience_z = as.numeric(title_salience),
    salience_broad_z = as.numeric(title_salience_broad),
    salience_z_sq = salience_z^2
  )

df_no_eu <- df %>% filter(country != "EU")


```


```{r}
# Election years
us_elections <- seq(1948, 2024, by = 4)

fr_elections <- c(
  1958, 1965, 1969, 1974, 1981, 1988,
  1995, 2002, 2007, 2012, 2017, 2022
)

ep_elections <- c(
  1979, 1984, 1989, 1994, 1999,
  2004, 2009, 2014, 2019, 2024
)

# Create election indicators
df <- df %>%
  mutate(
    election_year = case_when(
      country == "USA" & year %in% us_elections ~ 1L,
      country == "France" & year %in% fr_elections ~ 1L,
      country == "EP" & year %in% ep_elections ~ 1L,
      TRUE ~ 0L
    ),
    post_election_year = case_when(
      country == "USA" & (year - 1) %in% us_elections ~ 1L,
      country == "France" & (year - 1) %in% fr_elections ~ 1L,
      country == "EP" & (year - 1) %in% ep_elections ~ 1L,
      TRUE ~ 0L
    )
  )

# Model 5 (No Title Salience)
model5 <- lm(
  hiddenness_textual ~ election_year + post_election_year +
    split_government + year + factor(country),
  data = df
)

# Output table
stargazer(
  model5,
  type = "latex",
  title = "Electoral Timing and Relative Section Size",
  label = "tab:model5_elections",
  dep.var.labels = "Divergence vs Title",
  covariate.labels = c(
    "Election Year",
    "Post-Election Year",
    "Split Government",
    "Year"
  ),
  omit = "factor\\(country\\)",
  add.lines = list(
    c("Country Fixed Effects", "Yes"),
    c("Sample", "All Countries")
  ),
  digits = 3,
  no.space = TRUE,
  header = FALSE
)


```


```{r}
model1 <- feols(
  divergence_vs_title ~ salience_z + lobby_z | country,
  data = df,
  cluster = ~section_topic
)

model6 <- feols(
  divergence_vs_title ~ salience_z + salience_z_sq + split_government | country,
  data = df_no_eu,
  cluster = ~section_topic
)

model7 <- feols(
  divergence_vs_title ~ salience_z * lobby_z | country,
  data = df,
  cluster = ~section_topic
)

model8 <- feols(
  divergence_vs_title ~ salience_z * lobby_z + salience_z_sq | country,
  data = df,
  cluster = ~section_topic
)

etable(
  model1, model6, model7, model8,
  tex = TRUE,
  file = "output/regression_table_leg.tex",
  dict = c(
    salience_z = "Title salience",
    salience_z_sq = "Title salience$^2$",
    lobby_z = "Lobbying",
    `salience_z:lobby_z` = "Salience $\\times$ Lobbying",
    split_government = "Split government"
  )
)

```

```{r}
ecm_df <- df %>%
  arrange(country, year) %>%
  group_by(country) %>%
  mutate(
    divergence_vs_title_z = as.numeric(scale(divergence_vs_title)),
    d_divergence_vs_title = divergence_vs_title_z - lag(divergence_vs_title_z),
    d_salience = salience_z - lag(salience_z),
    d_salience_broad = salience_broad_z - lag(salience_broad_z),
    d_lobby = lobby_z - lag(lobby_z),
    l_divergence_vs_title = lag(divergence_vs_title_z),
    l_salience = lag(salience_z),
    l_salience_broad = lag(salience_broad_z),
    l_lobby = lag(lobby_z)
  ) %>%
  ungroup() %>%
  filter(
    !is.na(d_divergence_vs_title),
    !is.na(l_divergence_vs_title)
  )

ecm5 <- feols(
  d_divergence_vs_title ~ d_salience + l_divergence_vs_title + l_salience + l_lobby + d_salience * d_lobby + l_salience * l_lobby | country,
  data = ecm_df,
  cluster = ~section_topic
)

etable(
  ecm5,
  tex = TRUE,
  file = "output/ecm_regression_table_leg.tex",
  dict = c(
    d_salience = "Change in title salience",
    d_lobby = "Change in lobbying",
    l_divergence_vs_title = "Lagged divergence_vs_title",
    l_salience = "Lagged title salience",
    l_lobby = "Lagged lobbying"
  )
)

```

```{r}
model1 <- feols(
  hiddenness_textual ~ salience_z + lobby_z | country,
  data = df,
  cluster = ~section_topic
)

model6 <- feols(
  hiddenness_textual ~ salience_z + salience_z_sq + split_government | country,
  data = df_no_eu,
  cluster = ~section_topic
)

model7 <- feols(
  hiddenness_textual ~ salience_z * lobby_z | country,
  data = df,
  cluster = ~section_topic
)

model8 <- feols(
  hiddenness_textual ~ salience_z * lobby_z + salience_z_sq | country,
  data = df,
  cluster = ~section_topic
)

etable(
  model1, model6, model7, model8,
  tex = TRUE,
  file = "output/regression_table_hiddenness_leg.tex",
  dict = c(
    salience_z = "Title salience",
    salience_z_sq = "Title salience$^2$",
    lobby_z = "Lobbying",
    `salience_z:lobby_z` = "Salience $\\times$ Lobbying",
    split_government = "Split government"
  )
)
```

```{r}
ecm_df_hidden <- df %>%
  arrange(country, year) %>%
  group_by(country) %>%
  mutate(
    hiddenness_textual_z = as.numeric(scale(hiddenness_textual)),
    d_hiddenness_textual = hiddenness_textual_z - lag(hiddenness_textual_z),
    d_salience = salience_z - lag(salience_z),
    d_salience_broad = salience_broad_z - lag(salience_broad_z),
    d_lobby = lobby_z - lag(lobby_z),
    l_hiddenness_textual = lag(hiddenness_textual_z),
    l_salience = lag(salience_z),
    l_salience_broad = lag(salience_broad_z),
    l_lobby = lag(lobby_z)
  ) %>%
  ungroup() %>%
  filter(
    !is.na(d_hiddenness_textual),
    !is.na(l_hiddenness_textual)
  )

ecm5_hidden <- feols(
  d_hiddenness_textual ~ d_salience + l_hiddenness_textual + l_salience + l_lobby + d_salience * d_lobby + l_salience * l_lobby | country,
  data = ecm_df_hidden,
  cluster = ~section_topic
)

etable(
  ecm5_hidden,
  tex = TRUE,
  file = "output/ecm_regression_table_hiddenness_leg.tex",
  dict = c(
    d_salience = "Change in title salience",
    d_lobby = "Change in lobbying",
    l_hiddenness_textual = "Lagged hiddenness_textual",
    l_salience = "Lagged title salience",
    l_lobby = "Lagged lobbying"
  )
)

```


```{r}
# --- 1. Prepare variables ---
df <- df %>%
  mutate(
    Amount = as.numeric(gsub("[\\$,]", "", Amount)),
    lobby = case_when(
      country == "EU"  ~ lobby_avg,
      country == "USA" ~ Amount,
      TRUE             ~ NA_real_
    ),
    salience_z = as.numeric(scale(section_salience)),
    lobby_z    = as.numeric(scale(lobby))
  )

# --- 2. Interaction model ---
model_int <- feols(
  hiddenness_textual ~ salience_z * lobby_z | country,
  data = df,
  cluster = ~section_topic
)

# --- 3. Simple marginal effects (±1 SD) ---

# Salience at different lobbying levels
me_salience <- slopes(
  model_int,
  variables = "salience_z",
  newdata = datagrid(lobby_z = c(-1, 0, 1)),
  vcov = ~section_topic
) %>%
  transmute(
    term = "Salience",
    condition = case_when(
      lobby_z == -1 ~ "Lobbying = Low (-1 SD)",
      lobby_z ==  0 ~ "Lobbying = Mean (0)",
      lobby_z ==  1 ~ "Lobbying = High (+1 SD)"
    ),
    estimate, std.error, conf.low, conf.high, p.value
  )

# Lobbying at different salience levels
me_lobby <- slopes(
  model_int,
  variables = "lobby_z",
  newdata = datagrid(salience_z = c(-1, 0, 1)),
  vcov = ~section_topic
) %>%
  transmute(
    term = "Lobbying",
    condition = case_when(
      salience_z == -1 ~ "Salience = Low (-1 SD)",
      salience_z ==  0 ~ "Salience = Mean (0)",
      salience_z ==  1 ~ "Salience = High (+1 SD)"
    ),
    estimate, std.error, conf.low, conf.high, p.value
  )

# --- 4. 95th percentile effects ---

p95_salience <- quantile(df$salience_z, 0.95, na.rm = TRUE)
p95_lobby    <- quantile(df$lobby_z, 0.95, na.rm = TRUE)

me_95 <- bind_rows(

  slopes(
    model_int,
    variables = "salience_z",
    newdata = datagrid(lobby_z = p95_lobby),
    vcov = ~section_topic
  ) %>%
    transmute(
      term = "Salience",
      condition = "Lobbying = 95th percentile",
      estimate, std.error, conf.low, conf.high, p.value
    ),

  slopes(
    model_int,
    variables = "lobby_z",
    newdata = datagrid(salience_z = p95_salience),
    vcov = ~section_topic
  ) %>%
    transmute(
      term = "Lobbying",
      condition = "Salience = 95th percentile",
      estimate, std.error, conf.low, conf.high, p.value
    )
)

# --- 5. Combine table ---

me_table <- bind_rows(me_salience, me_lobby, me_95) %>%
  mutate(
    estimate  = round(estimate, 3),
    std.error = round(std.error, 3),
    conf.low  = round(conf.low, 3),
    conf.high = round(conf.high, 3),
    p.value   = round(p.value, 3)
  )

# --- 6. Export LaTeX table ---

latex_table <- kable(
  me_table,
  format = "latex",
  booktabs = TRUE,
  caption = "Marginal effects of salience and lobbying at varying levels of the interacting variable.",
  col.names = c("Term", "Condition", "Estimate", "SE", "CI Low", "CI High", "p-value")
)

writeLines(latex_table, "output/marginal_effects_hiddenness_salience_lobby.tex")
```

```{r}
# --- 2. Quadratic model (salience only) ---
model_salience_quad <- feols(
  hiddenness_textual ~ salience_z + I(salience_z^2) | country,
  data = df,
  cluster = ~section_topic
)

# --- 3. Marginal effects at different salience levels ---
me_salience_levels <- slopes(
  model_salience_quad,
  variables = "salience_z",
  newdata = datagrid(salience_z = c(-2, -1, 0, 1, 2)),
  vcov = ~section_topic
) %>%
  mutate(
    term = "Salience",
    condition = case_when(
      salience_z == -2 ~ "Very low (-2 SD)",
      salience_z == -1 ~ "Low (-1 SD)",
      salience_z ==  0 ~ "Mean (0)",
      salience_z ==  1 ~ "High (+1 SD)",
      salience_z ==  2 ~ "Very high (+2 SD)"
    )
  ) %>%
  select(term, condition, estimate, std.error, conf.low, conf.high, p.value)

# --- 4. Format table ---
me_salience_table <- me_salience_levels %>%
  mutate(
    estimate  = round(estimate, 3),
    std.error = round(std.error, 3),
    conf.low  = round(conf.low, 3),
    conf.high = round(conf.high, 3),
    p.value   = round(p.value, 3)
  )

# --- 5. Export LaTeX table ---
latex_table <- kable(
  me_salience_table,
  format = "latex",
  booktabs = TRUE,
  caption = "Marginal effects of salience at different levels of salience (quadratic model).",
  col.names = c("Term", "Condition", "Estimate", "SE", "CI Low", "CI High", "p-value")
)

writeLines(latex_table, "output/salience_quadratic_marginal_effects.tex")

# --- 6. Turning point (peak of inverted U) ---
b1 <- coef(model_salience_quad)["salience_z"]
b2 <- coef(model_salience_quad)["I(salience_z^2)"]

turning_point <- -b1 / (2 * b2)

print(turning_point)

# --- 7. (Optional) Plot marginal effect curve ---
plot_predictions(
  model_salience_quad,
  condition = "salience_z",
  vcov = FALSE
)

```

```{r}
# Quadratic OLS model for marginal effects table
model_quad_ols <- lm(divergence_vs_title ~ salience_z + I(salience_z^2), data = df)

# Grid values
grid_vals <- quantile(model.frame(model_quad_ols)$salience_z,
                      probs = c(.05, .25, .5, .75, .95),
                      na.rm = TRUE)

# Marginal effects
me_table <- slopes(model_quad_ols,
                   variables = "salience_z",
                   newdata = datagrid(salience_z = grid_vals)) %>%
  as.data.frame() %>%
  select(salience_z, estimate, std.error, conf.low, conf.high)

# Turning point
coefs <- coef(model_quad_ols)
turning_point <- -coefs["salience_z"] / (2 * coefs["I(salience_z^2)"])

turning_row <- data.frame(
  salience_z = turning_point,
  estimate = NA,
  std.error = NA,
  conf.low = NA,
  conf.high = NA
)

# Combine
final_table <- me_table %>%
  mutate(term = "Marginal effect") %>%
  bind_rows(turning_row %>% mutate(term = "Turning point"))

# Clean formatting
final_table_clean <- final_table %>%
  mutate(
    salience_z = round(salience_z, 3),
    estimate = round(estimate, 3),
    std.error = round(std.error, 3),
    conf.low = round(conf.low, 3),
    conf.high = round(conf.high, 3)
  ) %>%
  select(term, salience_z, estimate, std.error, conf.low, conf.high)
```


```{r}
latex_table <- kable(
  final_table_clean,
  format = "latex",
  booktabs = TRUE,
  caption = "Marginal Effects of Salience on Divergence",
  col.names = c("Type", "Salience (z)", "Marginal Effect", "SE", "CI Low", "CI High"),
  align = "lccccc"
) %>%
  kable_styling(latex_options = "hold_position")

writeLines(latex_table, "output/marginal_effects_divergence_quad_ols.tex")

```


```{r}
# Interaction model: hiddenness ~ salience * lobby
model_int <- feols(
  hiddenness_textual ~ salience_z * lobby_z | country,
  data = df,
  cluster = ~section_topic
)

# Marginal effect of salience at low / middle / high lobbying
me_salience <- slopes(
  model_int,
  variables = "salience_z",
  newdata = datagrid(lobby_z = c(-1, 0, 1)),
  vcov = ~section_topic
) %>%
  transmute(
    term = "Salience",
    condition = case_when(
      lobby_z == -1 ~ "Lobbying = Low (-1 SD)",
      lobby_z ==  0 ~ "Lobbying = Middle (0)",
      lobby_z ==  1 ~ "Lobbying = High (+1 SD)"
    ),
    estimate, std.error, conf.low, conf.high, p.value
  )

# Marginal effect of lobbying at low / middle / high salience
me_lobby <- slopes(
  model_int,
  variables = "lobby_z",
  newdata = datagrid(salience_z = c(-1, 0, 1)),
  vcov = ~section_topic
) %>%
  transmute(
    term = "Lobbying",
    condition = case_when(
      salience_z == -1 ~ "Salience = Low (-1 SD)",
      salience_z ==  0 ~ "Salience = Middle (0)",
      salience_z ==  1 ~ "Salience = High (+1 SD)"
    ),
    estimate, std.error, conf.low, conf.high, p.value
  )

# Final table
me_table <- bind_rows(me_salience, me_lobby) %>%
  mutate(
    estimate  = round(estimate, 3),
    std.error = round(std.error, 3),
    conf.low  = round(conf.low, 3),
    conf.high = round(conf.high, 3),
    p.value   = round(p.value, 3)
  )

latex_table <- kable(
  me_table,
  format = "latex",
  booktabs = TRUE,
  caption = "Marginal effects of salience and lobbying on textual hiddenness.",
  col.names = c("Term", "Condition", "Estimate", "SE", "CI Low", "CI High", "p-value")
) %>%
  kable_styling(latex_options = c("hold_position"))

writeLines(latex_table, "output/marginal_effects_table_hiddenness.tex")

```

```{r}
# Interaction model: divergence ~ salience * lobby
model_int_div <- feols(
  divergence_vs_title ~ salience_z * lobby_z | country,
  data = df,
  cluster = ~section_topic
)

me_salience_div <- slopes(
  model_int_div,
  variables = "salience_z",
  newdata = datagrid(lobby_z = c(-1, 0, 1)),
  vcov = ~section_topic
) %>%
  transmute(
    term = "Salience",
    condition = case_when(
      lobby_z == -1 ~ "Lobbying = Low (-1 SD)",
      lobby_z ==  0 ~ "Lobbying = Middle (0)",
      lobby_z ==  1 ~ "Lobbying = High (+1 SD)"
    ),
    estimate, std.error, conf.low, conf.high, p.value
  )

me_lobby_div <- slopes(
  model_int_div,
  variables = "lobby_z",
  newdata = datagrid(salience_z = c(-1, 0, 1)),
  vcov = ~section_topic
) %>%
  transmute(
    term = "Lobbying",
    condition = case_when(
      salience_z == -1 ~ "Salience = Low (-1 SD)",
      salience_z ==  0 ~ "Salience = Middle (0)",
      salience_z ==  1 ~ "Salience = High (+1 SD)"
    ),
    estimate, std.error, conf.low, conf.high, p.value
  )

me_table_div <- bind_rows(me_salience_div, me_lobby_div) %>%
  mutate(
    estimate  = round(estimate, 3),
    std.error = round(std.error, 3),
    conf.low  = round(conf.low, 3),
    conf.high = round(conf.high, 3),
    p.value   = round(p.value, 3)
  )

latex_table_div <- kable(
  me_table_div,
  format = "latex",
  booktabs = TRUE,
  caption = "Marginal effects of salience and lobbying on divergence between text and title.",
  col.names = c("Term", "Condition", "Estimate", "SE", "CI Low", "CI High", "p-value")
) %>%
  kable_styling(latex_options = c("hold_position"))

writeLines(latex_table_div, "output/marginal_effects_table_div.tex")

```
